title: Anxiety
why_this_song: Anxiety by Doechii (2025) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Keep it tryin', keep it tryin', oh, I feel the silence
Keep it quiet, keep it tired, oh, somebody's touching me
Keep it quiet, keep it quiet
Anxiety, anxie— oh, I feel anxiety

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "anxiety" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "anxiety" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shake" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "shake" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I feel it quietly, tryna silence me, yeah
What's in that clear blue water?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Keep it quiet, keep it quiet
What's in that new world order?

exercises.prompt_en: "Anxiety" was released in 2025. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Anxiety" foi lançada em 2025. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Anxiety" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Anxiety" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Doechii one question about "Anxiety", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Doechii sobre "Anxiety", o que seria e por quê?
